texto: Clarity is like casting light. Clarity allows us to see better and eases the path of understanding. And just as one light source need not deny the illumination of another but can add to it, the understanding gained through one explanation can stand to gain from another, even if it is different in approach. The truth is more exclusive...
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Cyrus Panjvani: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Clarity is like casting light. Clarity allows us to see better and eases the path of understandin…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, buddhism, clarity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de clarity e philosophy.
